page_title: Neon Genesis Evangelions: The Complete Guide
text:
is a guidebook for Neon Genesis Evangelions video game by Dengeki PlayStation Editorial Department. It was published by Media Works on 19 March 2004. https://www.amazon.co.jp/dp/4840226423 

Overview

Strategy book for version of Neon Genesis Evangelions. 
The truth of the "EVA2" world will be revealed with this... A detailed explanation of the game system that is the core of the game, such as increasing A.T. during free turns and increasing or decreasing character evaluation. All scenarios, conditions for occurrence of all events, and conditions for reaching all endings are documented. Covers various data of all Evangelions, Angels, items, and options.

Table of Contents
